local_results.title: Little Ghost
local_results.description: Funky shop for vintage fashions. Offbeat store carrying an assortment of vintage clothing & accessories, plus kitschy decor.
local_results.user_review: "Super cute, well organized and great prices!"

local_results.title: Still A Good Cause Thrift Shop
local_results.user_review: "The store is well kept, very clean and organized."

local_results.title: Weekend Vintage
local_results.description: Merchant stocking a curated collection of vintage clothing, from leather jackets to scarves.
local_results.user_review: "The selection and prices were incredible!"

local_results.title: Material Objects
local_results.description: Store selling secondhand men's and women's apparel, including vintage pieces.
local_results.user_review: "Great selection of tons of styles of vintage and great quality items!"

local_results.title: Find
local_results.description: Mellow shop for hip, secondhand attire. Low-key boutique offering stylish vintage & modern used clothing for men & women, plus accessories.
local_results.user_review: "The prices are super fair and everyone is super friendly."

local_results.title: The Salvation Army Thrift Store & Donation Center
local_results.description: Thrift store selling secondhand clothing and other goods to support drug and alcohol rehabilitation.
local_results.user_review: "Well organized and reasonable prices."

local_results.title: Everchanging Seasons Consignment Boutique
local_results.user_review: "Got a pair of beautiful barely worn black leather ugg boots for $30!"

local_results.title: Safe Combinations
local_results.user_review: "Inviting space with amazing finds!"

local_results.title: The Merchant Company
local_results.description: Cool shop for locally made gifts. Charming outpost for pottery, stationery, clothing & jewelry made by local crafts people.
local_results.user_review: "Good selection and solid prices."

local_results.title: Portland Flea-for-All
local_results.description: Cool source for vintage goods & clothes. Funky market with an eclectic collection of vintage furniture, clothing & more from various vendors.
local_results.user_review: "Shopped at The Flea For All and found a great buy on a oversized green vase."

local_results.title: Plato's Closet
local_results.address: 333 Clarks Pond Pkwy #620, South Portland, ME 04106
local_results.description: Resource for stylish used clothing. Chain retailer buying & selling trendy secondhand clothing for teens & young adults.
local_results.user_review: "The staff are friendly, it's very clean, and new stuff comes out regularly."

local_results.title: Moody Lords Vinyl/Vintage
local_results.description: Curated vinyls (new, used) alongside vintage wears in a cozy store.
local_results.user_review: "Incredible finds at a great price!"

local_results.title: Madlyn's New and Used Consignment Shop
local_results.description: Consignment shop offering a mix of new and pre-owned clothing, accessories, and home decor.
local_results.user_review: "Absolutely amazing shop with great prices, and very friendly staff."

local_results.title: Cherished Possessions
local_results.description: Consignment shop offering gently used furniture and decor, plus a garden center and pub.
local_results.user_review: "Great selection of reasonably priced, clean, good quality furniture."

local_results.title: Ferdinand
local_results.user_review: "Respectable prices and LOTS of fun handmade goodies."

local_results.title: Haberdashery Resale Clothing Co
local_results.description: Modern clothing store for secondhand items that are organized by type, rather than size.
local_results.user_review: "Friendly staff, clothes are phenomenal!"

local_results.title: Habitat for Humanity of Greater Portland / ReStore
local_results.address: 659 Warren Ave Suite A, Portland, ME 04103
local_results.description: Nonprofit featuring donated and used pieces for home improvement and furniture.
local_results.user_review: "Great store, often has lovely and unique pieces, reasonably priced."

local_results.title: Portland Trading Co
local_results.description: Eclectic men’s and women’s gift boutique selling carefully selected clothing, accessories and other items.
local_results.user_review: "Eclectic and well curated products that were all of excellent quality!"

local_results.title: Bonny Read
local_results.user_review: "They have lots of jewelry and cool decorative items."

local_results.title: Goodwill Store & Donation Center
local_results.address: 555 Maine Mall Rd #3250, South Portland, ME 04106
local_results.description: Nonprofit standby for secondhand goods. Long-standing nonprofit chain with a range of pre-owned clothing, housewares & more.
local_results.user_review: "Great selection of items, neatly organized and reasonably priced."
